title: eupatorium album var. petaloideum
intro: Eupatorium album var. petaloideum, also known as Agueweed or Purple Joe-Pye Weed, is a plant species in the Eupatorieae tribe within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, colds, and rheumatic disorders, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Agueweed include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies.
